description_long: This object is a robust, double-headed axe with a symmetrical design, featuring two broad, angular blades extending from a central hub. The blades are thick and wedge-shaped, with pronounced edges that taper to sharp points, giving the axe a formidable and heavy-duty appearance. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of metal, with a subtle grip texture near the end for secure handling. The overall finish is metallic and slightly matte, with a consistent dark gray coloration throughout. The axe lacks any visible decorative elements or engravings, emphasizing a utilitarian and functional design. Its construction suggests it is intended for heavy-duty tasks, possibly in demolition or rescue scenarios within urban environments.
description: A heavy, double-headed metallic axe with thick, angular blades and a straight, textured handle, all in a dark gray finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing both broad, wedge-shaped blades and the full length of the straight handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thin profile of the blades and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with both blades and handle visible.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, showing the narrow profile and the pointed ends of the blades.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical metal handle with a subtle grip texture near the end; cross-section appears round and the handle is uncurved.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, wedge-shaped blades with angular, symmetrical edges and no beard or decorative features; both blades are identical and robust.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern, integrated metal construction with the blade and handle appearing as a single forged or cast piece.
